valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Thu 23 Jul 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Fri 24 Jul 2026
general_synopsis: Developing low moving steadily northeastwards, expected 400 miles northeast of Iceland 991 by 1800 Thursday. High mid-Atlantic 1035 slow moving, declining 1034 by same time
